text:
AGREEMENT TO SELL

[To be executed on Non-Judicial Stamp Paper of appropriate value as per the Indian Stamp Act, 1899 and the relevant State Stamp Duty Schedule]

This AGREEMENT TO SELL _____________________ (hereinafter referred to as the "Agreement").

is executed on

this ___ day of ___________, 20___, at

BETWEEN:

Shri/Smt. ______________________________ S/o, D/o, W/o ______________________________, aged about ___ years, residing at ______________________________, PAN: ______________________________ (hereinafter referred to as the "VENDOR", which expression shall, unless repugnant to the context or meaning thereof, include his/her heirs, successors, legal representatives, administrators, executors, and assigns) of the ONE PART;

AND

Shri/Smt. ______________________________ S/o, D/o, W/o ______________________________, aged about ___ years, residing at ______________________________, PAN: ______________________________ (hereinafter referred to as the "PURCHASER", which expression shall, unless repugnant to the context or meaning thereof, include his/her heirs, successors, legal representatives, administrators, executors, and assigns) of the OTHER PART.

1. RECITALS:

1.1 The Vendor is the absolute, lawful owner and is seized and possessed of and/or otherwise well and sufficiently entitled to the property more particularly described in Schedule-A hereunder written (hereinafter referred to as the "Schedule Property").

1.2 The Vendor has agreed to sell, and the Purchaser has agreed to purchase, the Schedule Property on the terms and conditions set forth herein.

2. SALE CONSIDERATION:

2.1 The total sale consideration agreed upon between the parties is Rs. ______________ (Rupees ______________________________ only).

2.2 The Purchaser has paid an earnest money/advance amount of Rs. ______________ (Rupees ______________________________ only) by way of ______________________________ (Cash/Cheque No. _______ dated _______ drawn on _______ Bank) to the Vendor on the date of execution of this Agreement, the receipt of which the Vendor hereby acknowledges.

2.3 The balance amount of Rs. ______________ (Rupees ______________________________ only) shall be paid by the Purchaser to the Vendor at the time of execution and registration of the Sale Deed.

3. TIME FOR COMPLETION:

3.1 The parties agree to execute and register the Sale Deed before the Sub-Registrar of Assurances within ___ months from the date of this Agreement, i.e., on or before ______________________________.

3.2 Time is the essence of this Agreement.

4. TITLE AND POSSESSION:

4.1 The Vendor assures that the Schedule Property is free from all encumbrances, mortgages, charges, liens, claims, litigation, attachments, acquisitions, or any other legal proceedings.

4.2 The Vendor shall hand over actual, vacant, and peaceful possession of the Schedule Property to the Purchaser simultaneously with the execution of the Sale Deed.

4.3 The Vendor shall produce all original title documents pertaining to the Schedule Property before execution of the Sale Deed.

5. OBLIGATIONS OF THE VENDOR:

5.1 The Vendor shall clear all dues, taxes, municipal charges, electricity charges, water charges, maintenance charges, and all other outgoings in respect of the Schedule Property up to the date of execution of the Sale Deed.

5.2 The Vendor shall obtain all necessary No Objection Certificates (NOCs) and permissions required for the transfer of the Schedule Property.

5.3 The Vendor shall not create any encumbrance, charge, or third-party interest on the Schedule Property after the execution of this Agreement.

6. DEFAULT AND REMEDIES:

6.1 If the Vendor fails to execute the Sale Deed within the stipulated period without any valid reason, the Purchaser shall be entitled to seek specific performance of this Agreement under the Specific Relief Act, 1963, and/or claim refund of the advance amount with interest at the rate of ___% per annum along with damages.

6.2 If the Purchaser fails to pay the balance consideration or comply with his/her obligations within the stipulated period without any valid reason, the Vendor shall be entitled to forfeit the earnest money paid and/or seek any other remedy as available under law.

7. STAMP DUTY AND REGISTRATION:

7.1 The stamp duty, registration charges, and all other expenses related to execution and registration of the Sale Deed shall be borne by the Purchaser.

8. GOVERNING LAW:

8.1 This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of India. Any dispute arising out of or in connection with this Agreement shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts at ______________________________.

SCHEDULE-A: DESCRIPTION OF THE PROPERTY

Survey/Plot No.

Village/Town

Taluka/Tehsil

District/State

Area (in Sq. Ft./Sq. Mtr.)

________________________

________________________

________________________

________________________

________________________

Boundaries (North/South/East/West)

N:____________ S:____________ E:____________ W:____________

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement on the day, month and year first mentioned above.

VENDOR / TRANSFEROR

PURCHASER / TRANSFEREE

Signature: ___________________ Name: _______________________ Date: ________________________

Signature: ___________________ Name: _______________________ Date: ________________________

WITNESSES: 1. Name: ________________________ Signature: ________________ Address: _____________________

2. Name: ________________________ Signature: ________________ Address: _____________________

NOTARIZATION / REGISTRATION:

This document was presented before me and the parties acknowledged execution thereof on the date mentioned above.

Notary Public / Sub-Registrar Seal & Signature: ___________________________ Registration No.: ___________________ Date: ___________________ Place: ___________________
